body_txt: All kinds of Things That Go "Bump" in the Night seem to plague the media. It seems you can't throw a TV remote without hitting ghosts, vampires , The Legions of Hell , aliens, or some other type of monster. Fortunately, wherever there are monsters, there's likely to be people who hunt them, and they ain't afraid of no ghosts. These folks tend to come in a number of distinct varieties:  Of course, Muggles don't tend to be aware of the existence of the threat, so types 1-5 are often perceived as kooks, often of the Agent Mulder brand. Still, if there's something strange in your neighbourhood... See also Creature-Hunter Organization and Paranormal Investigation . Compare Occult Detective and often related to Demon Slaying . If they're good enough, they may boast We Do the Impossible .
